title: Skip The Wither
description: Allows nether star to be crafted
body:
Allows the Nether star to be crafted.
Now you dont need the boring wither fight anymore.
Withers can still be summoned

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c67418bf4487d63b25cc3d2abef47a5da57530ad.png)

**IMPORTANT! If minecraft says this mod is made for a older/newer version, make sure you downloaded the correct version (file name may not be updated if you downloadede the newest version). If the version is correct, its usually fine, you can keep using that version**
